title: "Pseudotime Cluster"
subtitle: "Marmoset"

author: 株式会社ダイナコム 久世、佐藤、江端
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y年%m月%d日')`"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
        toc_float:    # 目次は固定にしない
          collapsed: false
        number_section: true
        pandoc_args: ["--from", "markdown+autolink_bare_uris+tex_math_single_backslash-implicit_figures"]
        self_contained: False
---

```{=html}
<!-- 
sample1
sample1
merge
Integrate

QC & preprocess
PCA / UMAP / Cluster/ CellCycle / FeatureGene / DEG

-->
```
<!-- 画像をクリックすると拡大表示するjs -->

```{js echo=FALSE}
$(function(){
  $("img:not(.lb-image)").wrap(function() {
    return "<a href='" + $(this).attr("src") + "' data-lightbox='" + $(this).attr("scr") + "'></a>";
  });
});
```

## Load Library

```{r setup, include=F ,echo =T}
setwd("/Analysis/work/")

# ライブラリ読み込み先を指定
.libPaths()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# BioInfo Toll
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratData)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(Signac)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(BSgenome.Cjacchus.UCSC.calJac4)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GeneOverlap)
library(SCENT);
library(Pando)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
library(chromVAR)
library(motifmatchr)
library(SummarizedExperiment)

# Rstatics
library(MyEllipsefit)
library(gam)
library(dtwclust)
library(glassoFast)
library(princurve)

# R utilitu
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(yaml)
library(DT)
library(igraph)
library(ggraph)
library(gridExtra)
#library(Matrix)
library(tidygraph)
library(openxlsx)

library(reticulate)
library(tsfeatures)
library(cluster)
library(fs)


# Plotting
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(Polychrome)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(colorRamp2)
library(pheatmap)
library(scCustomize)
library(viridis)
library(Nebulosa)
library(scales)

library(ggforce)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ape)
library(ggtree)
library(ggtext)

library(scatterpie)
library(grid)
library(gtable)
library(ggrepel)


# palalle
library(doFuture)
library(future)
library(parallel)
#library(foreach)
#library(future.apply)
library(doParallel)
library(BiocParallel)


set.seed(1234)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 1e12)
```

## Read YAML

Parmeterを記載したYAMLファイルの読み込み

```{r ReadYAML, include=FALSE, echo =F}
# 引数で指定できるように
#yaml_file = "/Analysis/work/work_kuze/conf/Trajectory_Combined_Rezvani_2022_P3_Pando.yaml"
yaml_file = "/Analysis/work/work_kuze/conf/Trajectory_Combined_Rezvani_2022_P5_Pando_260616.yaml"
param <- yaml.load_file(yaml_file)


#ディレクトリマップ
dir_map <- param$directories

# 各ファイルのフルパスを構築
file_paths <- lapply(param$files, function(f) {
  fs::path(dir_map[[f$dir]], f$name)
})

out_paths <- lapply(param$outfiles, function(f) {
  fs::path(dir_map[[f$dir]], f$name)
})

# 名前付きリストに変換
names(file_paths) <- names(param$files)
names(out_paths) <- names(param$outfiles)

param$files <- file_paths
param$outfiles <- out_paths

# outdirがなければ作成
dir_path <- param$directories$outdir
# ディレクトリの存在を確認し、存在しない場合は作成
if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) {
  dir.create(dir_path, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", dir_path)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", dir_path)
}

# outdirのsubdirも作成
for( i in c(1:length(param$outdir_list))) {
  param$outdir_list[i] <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/",param$outdir_list[i] )
  d = param$outdir_list[i] %>% unlist
  if (!dir.exists(d)) {
    dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE)
    message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", d)
  } 
}

if (!is.null(param$pca_ndim)){
  param$pca_ndim <-  eval(parse(text = param$pca_ndim)) 
  # param$monocle.useCluster <- eval(parse(text = param$monocle.useCluster)) 
}
param$outdir <- param$directories$outdir
print(param)

#set.seed(1234)
#palette <- createPalette(20,　seedcolors=  c("#010101", "#ff0000"), M = 1000,prefix="NA")
palettedt <- readRDS( param$colerPalet)
names(palettedt) <- NULL
# カラーパレットを表示します
print(palettedt)
# カラーパレットを視覚的に確認するためのプロット
swatch(palettedt)

```


## Common Function
``` {r function,include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
source(param$files$Function)
standardt_obj_list <- c("standardt_obj_list","param","cluster_pallete", "palettedt")
cluster_pallete <- palettedt[1:20]
names(cluster_pallete) <- c(0:19 )
bincoloer <- viridis(10)


PredTime <- function(timebin_data , brdu_perid ){
  bincount <-  timebin_data$sds.data %>% 
    group_by(time.idx ) %>% 
    summarise( count = n()) %>%
    ungroup()

  totalcell <-  bincount$count %>% sum()
  Pred_cellPerDay <-  totalcell / brdu_perid
  Pred_RealTime <-  bincount %>% 
    mutate( PredDay = count / Pred_cellPerDay ) %>% 
    mutate( cum_freq = cumsum(PredDay )) %>%
    mutate(st = cum_freq- PredDay ,end = cum_freq)
  
  bincount_Cluster <- timebin_data$umap.sds %>% 
    dplyr::select( "Cell" ,"time.idx","cluster" ) %>% 
    group_by(time.idx,cluster ) %>% 
    summarise( count = n()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(. , Pred_RealTime , by ="time.idx")
  return( Pred_RealTime )
  
}

```


## Import data

```{r Read_old data, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
######################
#Function
#####################

SetCellAnnotation  <- function(param,SeuratOBJ,Category_list, from_cname ="seurat_clusters"){
  
  from_val_list <- c()
  to_val_list <- c()
  for (i in c(1:length(Category_list)) ){
    for (l in c(1:length(Category_list[[i]]))){
      from_val_list <- c( from_val_list,Category_list[[i]][l] )
      to_val_list <- c(to_val_list,names(Category_list)[i] )
    }
  }
  category_change_list <- cbind( from =from_val_list , to =to_val_list )  %>% as.data.frame()
  # from val not unique or uique chek
  if( length(unique(category_change_list$from)) != nrow(category_change_list) ) {
    print( "ERR!! from val not uniq !!")
    return(0)
  }
  rownames(category_change_list) <- category_change_list$from
  print(category_change_list)
  
  # make New metadate 
  CellType_meta <- SeuratOBJ@meta.data %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate( !!sym(from_cname) := as.character(!!sym(from_cname)) ) %>%
    mutate( CellType = category_change_list[ !!sym(from_cname), "to" ] ) %>%
    pull( CellType )
  return(CellType_meta)
}


### Check CellCycle Score
###
### @input : praram ,SeuratOBJ,cluster_pallete
### @return : None

plotCellCycle <- function(param ,SeuratOBJ,cluster_pallete ){
  p<-DimPlot( SeuratOBJ ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",cols = cluster_pallete )
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umap_allCell.pdf" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 5 )
  
  p <-VlnPlot( SeuratOBJ,features=c("S.Score", "G2M.Score" ),n = 2, group.by ="seurat_clusters" , pt.size = 0) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/vinplot_S_G2Mscore_all.pdf" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )
  
  p<-DimPlot( SeuratOBJ ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",cols = cluster_pallete )
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umap_allCell.pdf" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 5 )
  
  p <-VlnPlot( SeuratOBJ,features=c("S.Score", "G2M.Score" ),n = 2, group.by ="seurat_clusters" , pt.size = 0) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/vinplot_S_G2Mscore_all.pdf" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )
  
  return(0)
}


### Set CellCycle & Cluster Category
###
### @input : param,SeuratOBJ,CellCycle_th=0.25,cc.genes
### @return : SeuratOBJ , 
SetCellCycle <- function(param,SeuratOBJ,CellCycle_th=0.25,cc.genes){
  #CellCycle_th <- 0.25
  s.genes <- cc.genes$s.genes
  s.genes <-  intersect(s.genes , rownames(SeuratOBJ))
  Category_list <- param$ClusterCategory
  
  SeuratOBJ$rePhase <-SeuratOBJ@meta.data%>% 
    as.data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::select( "S.Score" ,"G2M.Score" ) %>%
    apply(. , 1 , function(x,CellCycle_th){
      if(x[1] < CellCycle_th & x[2] < CellCycle_th ){
        return("G1")
      } else if(x[1] >= CellCycle_th & x[2] < CellCycle_th ){
        return("S")
      } else if(x[1] < CellCycle_th & x[2] >= CellCycle_th ){
        return("G2M")
      } else if(x[1] >= CellCycle_th & x[2] >= CellCycle_th ){
        if( x[1] > x[2]){
          return("S")
        } else{
          return("G2M")
        }
        return("S")
      }
    },CellCycle_th=CellCycle_th)
  SeuratOBJ$rePhase <- factor(SeuratOBJ$rePhase , levels = c("G1","S","G2M") )
  p<-DimPlot( SeuratOBJ ,group.by = c("rePhase","Phase") ,pt.size = 0.2) 
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umap_Compare_S_G2M.pdf" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )
  
  #output.file  <- paste0( param$outdir,"/ClusterCount_mat.txt" )
  #CellCount <- SeuratOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  #  select("rePhase" ,"seurat_clusters" , "CellType" )
  #write.table( CellCount , file =output.file , quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = F )
  
  ## Functionにする
  tableCellCyecle<- table(SeuratOBJ$rePhase, SeuratOBJ$CellType) %>% t
  output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Table_CellCyeclerePhase.txt")
  write.table(tableCellCyecle , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )
  
  tableCellCyecle_Cluster<- table(SeuratOBJ$rePhase, SeuratOBJ$seurat_clusters)%>% 
    as.data.frame()%>% 
    rename( Phase="Var1",Cluster="Var2") %>% 
    pivot_wider(.,names_from = "Phase",values_from = "Freq") %>% 
    mutate( CellType = if_else(Cluster %in%  Category_list$SSCs , "SSCs" , 
                               if_else(Cluster %in%  Category_list$Differentiation , "SPG(Differentiatio)" , "Other"  )
    )) 
  
  output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Table_CellCyecle_Cluster.txt")
  write.table(tableCellCyecle_Cluster , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )
  ## 
  
  return( SeuratOBJ)
}



### SeuratPlot
###
### @input : param , subsetOBJ , cluster_pallete ,cc.genes
### @return :

SueratSubsetandPlot <- function(param , subsetOBJ , cluster_pallete ,cc.genes){
  p<-DimPlot( subsetOBJ ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",cols = cluster_pallete )
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umap_SSCandDividedCell" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 6,width = 6 )
  
  p <- DimPlot( subsetOBJ ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",cols = cluster_pallete , split.by  = "seurat_clusters")
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umpa_split_cluster_dividcell" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 20 )
  
  p <- DimPlot( subsetOBJ ,group.by = "rePhase" ,pt.size = 0.2, split.by  = "rePhase") 
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/umap_split_manualPhase_dividcell" )
  wggplot( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 15 )
  
  
}

#######################
## Main process
#######################
SeuratOBJ <- readRDS(param$before_combined)

DefaultAssay(SeuratOBJ) <- "RNA"
SeuratOBJ <- NormalizeData(SeuratOBJ)

commonGene <- SeuratOBJ[["RNA"]]@features@.Data %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  dplyr::filter( if_all(everything(), ~ .x == TRUE) ) %>% 
  rownames %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()

# assayごとにフィルタリング
SeuratOBJ[["RNA"]] <- subset(SeuratOBJ[["RNA"]], features = intersect(commonGene, rownames(SeuratOBJ[["RNA"]])) )
SeuratOBJ[["SCT"]] <- subset(SeuratOBJ[["SCT"]], features = intersect(commonGene, rownames(SeuratOBJ[["SCT"]])) )


cluster_pallete <- palettedt
names(cluster_pallete) <- c(0:(length(palettedt)-1))

emb ="umap"
Category_list <- param$Info$Combined$ClusterCategory


## 後で修正
param$outdir <- param$outdir_list$preprocess
plotCellCycle(param ,SeuratOBJ,cluster_pallete )
SeuratOBJ$CellType <-SetCellAnnotation(param,SeuratOBJ,Category_list, from_cname ="seurat_clusters")
SeuratOBJ <- SetCellCycle(param , SeuratOBJ , CellCycle_th=0.25 , cc.genes)

subset_Cluster <- Category_list$SSCs
subsetOBJ <- subset(SeuratOBJ, seurat_clusters  %in% subset_Cluster )
subsetOBJ <- subsetOBJ[,colnames(subsetOBJ)[subsetOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,1] < 2.6 &
                         subsetOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,2] > -10 ] ]
                         

DimPlot( subsetOBJ ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",cols = cluster_pallete )
#plot
SueratSubsetandPlot(param , subsetOBJ , cluster_pallete ,cc.genes)

standardt_obj_list <- c("standardt_obj_list","param","SeuratOBJ","cluster_pallete", "palettedt","Category_list","subsetOBJ","subset_Cluster","emb")
                        # "LINGER_data_list","emb","numusePeak")

```

## Elipse fit Pseudotime

```{r Elipse, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
## Input  : param ,subsetOBJ  
## Output : plot
#extract start cell
emb ="umap"
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin_day

if (! "umap" %in%  names(subsetOBJ@reductions)){
  subsetOBJ@reductions[["umap"]] <-  subsetOBJ@reductions[[emb]] 
  colnames(subsetOBJ@reductions[["umap"]]@cell.embeddings) <- c( "umap_1","umap_2")
}

start_cell_candidate <- list()


# Pattern3
umap_emb <- subsetOBJ@reductions[["umap"]]@cell.embeddings
umap_emb  %>% 
   as.data.frame( )%>% 
   rownames_to_column( var ="cell") %>% 
   mutate( rePhase = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "rePhase" ] , 
           cluster= subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "seurat_clusters" ] ,
           S.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"S.Score"],
           G2M.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"G2M.Score"] ,
           comScore = S.Score - G2M.Score,
           sumScore = S.Score + G2M.Score) %>% 
   filter( cluster==8 & rePhase == "S"& S.Score < 0 & G2M.Score < 0 ) %>% 
   arrange(sumScore) %>% head

umap_emb  %>% 
    as.data.frame( )%>% 
    rownames_to_column( var ="cell") %>% 
    mutate( rePhase = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "rePhase" ] , 
            cluster= subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "seurat_clusters" ] ,
            S.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"S.Score"],
            G2M.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"G2M.Score"] ,
            comScore = S.Score - G2M.Score) %>% 
    filter(cluster==8 & rePhase == "G1"& S.Score < 0 & G2M.Score < 0) %>%
  pull(cell) -> testcall
subsetOBJ$test <- "Other"
subsetOBJ$test[testcall] <- "Select"
DimPlot( subsetOBJ ,group.by = "test" )

start_cell ="Human_241125_38yr_ACCTACCTCTCCTCAA-1"
start_cell_candidate[["P3"]] <- start_cell



#Pattern5 
umap_emb <- subsetOBJ@reductions[["umap"]]@cell.embeddings
umap_emb  %>% 
   as.data.frame( )%>% 
   rownames_to_column( var ="cell") %>% 
   mutate( rePhase = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "rePhase" ] , 
           cluster= subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell , "seurat_clusters" ] ,
           S.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"S.Score"],
           G2M.Score = subsetOBJ@meta.data[cell ,"G2M.Score"] ,
           comScore = S.Score + G2M.Score) %>% 
   filter( cluster==8 & rePhase == "S" ) %>% 
   arrange( G2M.Score) %>% head


start_cell = "Human_241125_38yr_GCCCGTTGTTGGTGAC-1"
start_cell_candidate[["P5"]] <- start_cell


start_cell <- start_cell_candidate[[param$PATTERN]] 

param$outdir <- param$outdir_list$Pseudotime
timeBin_data_org <- fitPseudoTime_theta(subsetOBJ, #fitPseudoTime
                    reverset.time = F , 
                    total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day ,
                    bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin_day, # 当初は42binで予想
                    start_cells = start_cell )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime, "/time_bin_data_org.rds" )
saveRDS(timeBin_data_org , output.file )


elipsePlot.data <- timeBin_data_org$umap.sds

p1 <- elipsePlot.data%>% ggplot() + geom_point(aes( x=umap_1 , y=umap_2 , col =t ), size = 0.5) +
    stat_myell(aes(x=umap_1 ,y= umap_2),colour = "red") +
    theme_classic()
p2 <- elipsePlot.data %>% ggplot() + geom_point(aes( x=umap_1  , y=umap_2 , col =cluster ), size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_pallete)+
  theme_classic()
p1 + p2
output.file = paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime,"/ElipsePlot_modified_divededCell_beforeExtrapolate" )
wggplot( p1+p2 , output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```

## Extrapolate Dividing cell

```{r fitting curve, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}

#外挿に関しては クラスタ8を抜き出す。
timeBin_data_org <- readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime, "/time_bin_data_org.rds" ) )

Extrapolate_bin <- function(timeBin_data , celllist ){
  timeBin_data$sds.data =timeBin_data$sds.data %>% 
    mutate( time.idx = if_else( Cell %in% celllist , 0 ,  time.idx +1),
            t = if_else( Cell %in% celllist , 0 ,  t +1),
    )
  
  timeBin_data$umap.sds = timeBin_data$umap.sds %>%
    mutate( time.idx = if_else( Cell %in% celllist , 0 ,  time.idx +1),
            t = if_else( Cell %in% celllist , 0 ,  t +1),
    )
  return(timeBin_data)
}

celllist <- subsetOBJ@meta.data %>% as.data.frame %>% filter(seurat_clusters == 8) %>% rownames()
timeBin_data <- Extrapolate_bin(timeBin_data_org , celllist)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime, "/time_bin_data.rds" )
saveRDS(timeBin_data , output.file )


# x=umap_1 , y=umap_2 , col =t
elipsePlot.data <- timeBin_data$umap.sds
p1 <- elipsePlot.data%>% ggplot() + geom_point(aes( x=umap_1 , y=umap_2 , col =t ), size = 0.5) +
    stat_myell(aes(x=umap_1 ,y= umap_2),colour = "red") +
    theme_classic()
p2 <- elipsePlot.data %>% ggplot() + geom_point(aes( x=umap_1  , y=umap_2 , col =cluster ), size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_pallete)+
  theme_classic()
p1 + p2
output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/ElipsePlot_modified_divededCell_AfterExtrapolate" )
wggplot( p1+p2 , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```

## Plot bin / cluster bar plot
```{r}

timeBin_data <-readRDS(  paste0(param$outdir_list$Pseudotime, "/time_bin_data.rds" ) )
bin_anno_data <-table(timeBin_data$umap.sds$cluster, timeBin_data$umap.sds$time.idx) %>% 
  as.matrix() %>% t
rownames(bin_anno_data) <- 0:(param$Info$Prediction$total_day+1)

long_bin_anno_data <-  bin_anno_data  %>% as.data.frame() %>% rename( bin="Var1",Cluster = "Var2") 

# 文字サイズ設定
base_size <- 15
axis_title_size <- base_size
axis_text_size <- base_size - 2

p<-long_bin_anno_data %>% ggplot() + 
  geom_bar( aes( x= bin , y =Freq , fill = Cluster,) ,  stat="identity" , position = "stack") + 
  scale_fill_manual( values = cluster_pallete )+
  theme_classic()+  
  labs(title = "Frquency of Cell per bin",
       x = "Pseudotime Bin",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Clsuter")+
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(size = axis_title_size, color = "black")
  )
p
output.file = paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,"/PseudotimeBin_ClusterFreq" )
wggplot(p,output.file,height =  3,width =  8 )


rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```


## fitting curve

```{r fitting curve, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}

###  GAM fitting 
###
### @input : param,SeuratOBJ , Category_list
### @return : SeuratOBJ 

fitSmoothGAM  <- function(Y , genes , cell.ord , pseudotime ,num.cores =5 ,L1,total_day = 42 ,bin_day= 1,k =6){
  library(mgcv)
  expr_matrix <-Y[genes, cell.ord]
  sc.tc.df.adj <- expr_matrix  %>% 
    t %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    rownames_to_column( var ="Cell") %>% 
    pivot_longer(-Cell,names_to = "GeneID",values_to = "log2.expr") %>% 
    left_join( . , (L1$sds.data %>% dplyr::select( Cell , t ,rep)) , by = "Cell" ) %>%
    #mutate( t= (t -min(t))/ ( max(t)-min(t))) %>%
    transmute(y = log2.expr, tme = t, ind = rep, variable = GeneID)  
  
  spline.fits <- mclapply(1:length(genes), function(i){
    # GAMで周期的スプラインをフィッティング
    tmp <-  sc.tc.df.adj %>% dplyr::filter(variable == genes[i]) %>%
      transmute(GeneID = variable, x = tme, y = y)
    y <- tmp$y
    t <- tmp$x
    fit <- gam(y ~ s(t, bs = "cc",k = k))  
    newdata <- data.frame(t = seq(0, total_day, by = bin_day))
    rna.sp <- predict(fit, newdata = newdata)
    mu <- data.frame(x = seq(0, total_day, by = bin_day), y = rna.sp) 
    mu <- data.frame(GeneID = rep(tmp$GeneID[1], length(mu[,1])), x = mu[,1], y = mu[,2])
    return(mu)
  }, mc.cores = num.cores)
  
  return(spline.fits)
}

###  spline fitting 
###
### @input : param,SeuratOBJ , Category_list
### @return : SeuratOBJ 

fitSmoothSpline  <- function(Y , genes , cell.ord , pseudotime ,num.cores =5 ,L1,total_day = 42 ,bin_day= 1){
  expr_matrix <-Y[genes, cell.ord]
  sc.tc.df.adj <- expr_matrix  %>% 
    t %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    rownames_to_column( var ="Cell") %>% 
    pivot_longer(-Cell,names_to = "GeneID",values_to = "log2.expr") %>% 
    left_join( . , (L1$sds.data %>% dplyr::select( Cell , t ,rep)) , by = "Cell" ) %>%
    transmute(y = log2.expr, tme = t, ind = rep, variable = GeneID) 
  
  
  spline.fits <- mclapply(1:length(genes), function(i){
    tmp <- sc.tc.df.adj %>% dplyr::filter(variable == genes[i]) %>%
      transmute(GeneID = variable, x = tme, y = y)
    y <- tmp$y
    t <- tmp$x
    
    w <- rep(1, length(y))
    w[which(y == 0)] <- 1/2
    rna.sp <- smooth.spline(t, y, lambda = 0.1, w = w)
    
    rna.sp <- predict(rna.sp, seq(0, total_day, by = bin_day)) 
    mu <- data.frame(x = rna.sp$x, y = rna.sp$y) 
    mu <- data.frame(GeneID = rep(tmp$GeneID[1], length(mu[,1])), x = mu[,1], y = mu[,2])
    return(mu)
  }, mc.cores = num.cores)
  
  return(spline.fits)
}





## Input  : param ,subsetOBJ  ,timeBin_data
## Output : sc.spline.fits 

total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin_day

param$outfiles$out_timebin <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime, "/time_bin_data.rds" )

result_fit <-DoExpgittingcurve_species( param, subsetOBJ, total_day = total_day+1 , #外挿分を+1する
                              num.cores = 30 ,assay ="RNA" )

output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp.rds")
saveRDS(result_fit , output.file)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```

## Plot Summary
```{r}

#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <- readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp.rds"))
combinedOBJ <- readRDS( param$before_combined)

# coloer
pal <- viridis(n = 10, option = "turbo")

# load Human Data
hum_sr.o.all.local <- readRDS( param$files$Human_SRscore )
HumanSeuratOBJ <- readRDS( param$files$HumanSeuratOBJ )
hum_sr.o.all.local.SR <-  hum_sr.o.all.local$SR
names(hum_sr.o.all.local.SR ) <- rownames(HumanSeuratOBJ@meta.data )

# load marmoset data
MarmSeuratOBJ <- readRDS(param$files$MarmSeuratOBJ)
mar_sr.o.all.local <- readRDS(param$files$Marm_SRscore)
mar_sr.o.all.local.SR <-  mar_sr.o.all.local$SR
names(mar_sr.o.all.local.SR ) <- rownames(MarmSeuratOBJ@meta.data )

sr.score.file <- list( human = hum_sr.o.all.local.SR , marmoset =  mar_sr.o.all.local.SR )
addATACobj <- list( human = HumanSeuratOBJ , marmoset = MarmSeuratOBJ)

Category_list <- param$Info$Combined$ClusterCategory

#spe_ATAC$combined_cluster <- combinedOBJ@meta.data[ colnames(spe_ATAC) ,"seurat_clusters"]
cell_list <- c(colnames(fitting_result[["human"]]$seuratobj) , colnames(fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$seuratobj))
combinedOBJ$combined_CellType <- SetCellAnnotation(param,
                                                combinedOBJ,
                                                Category_list, 
                                                from_cname ="seurat_clusters")
CellType_modefied_cell <-combinedOBJ@meta.data %>%
  rownames_to_column( var = "Cell") %>% 
  dplyr::filter( combined_CellType == "SSCs"  & !Cell %in%  cell_list ) %>% 
  pull(Cell)
combinedOBJ$combined_CellType[CellType_modefied_cell] <- "Differentiation"

#---------------------
# Cell Segragation
#---------------------
GS.hallmark <- readRDS(　param$files$GSdata )
CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_gene  <- GS.hallmark["GOBP-CHROMOSOME-SEGREGATION"]
# 328 gene
CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_gene <- intersect( CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_gene$`GOBP-CHROMOSOME-SEGREGATION` ,
                                          rownames(combinedOBJ@assays$RNA))

#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# update combined obj
#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

commonGene <- combinedOBJ[["RNA"]]@features@.Data %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  dplyr::filter( if_all(everything(), ~ .x == TRUE) ) %>% 
  rownames %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()

DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "RNA"
combinedOBJ[["RNA"]] <- subset(combinedOBJ[["RNA"]], features = intersect(commonGene, rownames(combinedOBJ[["RNA"]])) )
combinedOBJ[["SCT"]] <- subset(combinedOBJ[["SCT"]], features = intersect(commonGene, rownames(combinedOBJ[["SCT"]])) )
combinedOBJ <- JoinLayers(object = combinedOBJ ,assay = "RNA")

#---------------------
# add bin
#---------------------
combinedOBJ$bin <- NA
combinedOBJ$bin[ fitting_result$marmoset$time.bin.data$sds.data$Cell ] <- 
  fitting_result$marmoset$time.bin.data$sds.data$time.idx
combinedOBJ$bin[ fitting_result$human$time.bin.data$sds.data$Cell ] <- 
  fitting_result$human$time.bin.data$sds.data$time.idx

#---------------------
# add SRcore
#---------------------
combinedOBJ$SRcore <- NA
combinedOBJ$SRcore[ names(hum_sr.o.all.local.SR ) ] <- hum_sr.o.all.local.SR
combinedOBJ$SRcore[ names(mar_sr.o.all.local.SR ) ] <- mar_sr.o.all.local.SR

#--------------------
# add Riboscore & CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION
#--------------------
#DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "RNA"
# ⑤ HGNC記号ベースでリボソーム遺伝子を抽出

ribo_hgnc <- grep("^RP[SL][0-9]{1,2}[A-Z]*$", commonGene, value = TRUE)
combinedOBJ <- NormalizeData(object = combinedOBJ ,assay = "RNA")
combinedOBJ <- AddModuleScore(
  object = combinedOBJ, assay = "RNA",
  features = list(ribo_hgnc),  #
  name = "RiboActivity" 
)

combinedOBJ <- AddModuleScore(
  object = combinedOBJ, assay = "RNA",
  features = list(CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_gene),  #
  name = "CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION" 
)

#--------------------
#　分裂前後で分ける
#--------------------
combinedOBJ$round_cluster <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters %>% as.character()
combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters == 1 & combinedOBJ$bin > 20] <- "bfDivid_1"
combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters == 1 & combinedOBJ$bin <= 20] <- "afDivid_1"
combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters == 1 & combinedOBJ$bin <= 20] <- "afDivid_1"
combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters%in% c(6,7)] <- "6_7"




for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  #+ load data
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  
  #spe ="marmoset"
  timeBin_data <-fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  spe_subsetOBJ <- fitting_result[[spe]]$seuratobj
  sc.spline.fits <- fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam
  
  # add metadata 
  sr.o.all.local <- sr.score.file[[spe]]
  spe_subsetOBJ$SRscore <- sr.o.all.local[rownames(spe_subsetOBJ@meta.data)]
  bin_data <- timeBin_data$sds.data$time.idx
  names(bin_data) <- timeBin_data$sds.data$Cell
  spe_subsetOBJ$bin <- bin_data[ rownames(spe_subsetOBJ@meta.data) ]
  outdir <- param$outdir_list$STATS
  
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  #+ Ribosomal score
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  # ⑤ HGNC記号ベースでリボソーム遺伝子を抽出
  ribo_hgnc <- grep("^RP[SL][0-9]{1,2}[A-Z]*$", rownames(spe_subsetOBJ), value = TRUE)
  
  spe_subsetOBJ <- AddModuleScore(
    object = spe_subsetOBJ,
    features = list(ribo_hgnc),  #
    name = "RiboActivity" 
  )
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  #+ GO term score
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  spe_subsetOBJ <- AddModuleScore(
    object = spe_subsetOBJ,
    features = list(CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_gene),  #
    name = "CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION" 
  )
  
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  #+  Setting ATAC
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  # LINGER
  spe_ATAC <- addATACobj[[spe]]
  DefaultAssay(spe_ATAC) <- "ATAC"
  spe_ATAC$combined_cluster <- combinedOBJ@meta.data[ colnames(spe_ATAC) ,"combined_CellType"]
  
  DefaultAssay(spe_ATAC) <- "ATAC"
  annotations <- Annotation(spe_ATAC[["ATAC"]])
  peak_name <- rownames(spe_ATAC[["ATAC"]])
  use_peakflag <- !is.na(peak_name) &
    str_detect(peak_name, "chr") &
    !str_detect(peak_name, "chrUn") &
    !str_detect(peak_name, "random")

  peak_region <- peak_name[use_peakflag]
  
  tmp_atac <- resetAssayt(spe_ATAC, useAssay = "ATAC", feature = peak_region)
  DefaultAssay(spe_ATAC) <- "RNA"
  spe_ATAC[["ATAC"]] <- NULL
  spe_ATAC[["ATAC"]] <- tmp_atac@assays$ATAC
  DefaultAssay(spe_ATAC) <- "ATAC"
  fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_obj <- spe_ATAC


  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
  #+ Plotting
  #++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

  fitting_result[[spe]]$seuratobj <- spe_subsetOBJ

  # RiboActivity1
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ , 
                             features ="RiboActivity1" ,colors_use  =pal)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "RiboActivity1",
                group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols =  cluster_pallete,
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "RiboActivity1",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/RibActivityPlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )

  # CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ ,  na_cutoff = 0,
                             features ="CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION1" ,colors_use  =pal)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION1",
                group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols =  cluster_pallete,
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION1",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/CHROMOSOME_SEGREGATION_Plot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  
  # S Score
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ ,  na_cutoff = -0.25,
                             features ="S.Score" ,colors_use  =pal)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "S.Score",
                group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols =  cluster_pallete,
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "S.Score",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/S_ScorePlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  
  # G2M Score
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ ,  na_cutoff = -0.25,
                             features ="G2M.Score" ,colors_use  =pal)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "G2M.Score",
                group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols =  cluster_pallete,
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "G2M.Score",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/G2M_ScoreyPlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  
  # SR score plot
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ , features ="SRscore" ,
                             colors_use = pal,  na_cutoff = 0.84 ,pt.size = 0.1,max.cutoff = 0.89)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "SRscore",group.by = "seurat_clusters",
                cols =  cluster_pallete,pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "SRscore",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/SRscorePlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  
    
  ## UMI plot
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ , features ="nCount_RNA" ,
                             colors_use = pal,  max.cutoff = 30000 ,na_cutoff = 2000,pt.size = 0.3)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "nCount_RNA",group.by = "seurat_clusters",
                cols =  cluster_pallete,pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "nCount_RNA",group.by = "bin", 
                cols  =viridis(44),y.max=30000,
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/nCountRNAPlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  
  
  ## nFeaturePlot
  p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(seurat_object = spe_subsetOBJ , features ="nFeature_RNA" ,
                             colors_use = pal,  max.cutoff = 30000 ,na_cutoff = 2000,pt.size = 0.3)
  p2 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "nFeature_RNA",group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
                cols =  cluster_pallete,pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) 
  p3 <- VlnPlot(spe_subsetOBJ,features = "nFeature_RNA",group.by = "bin", cols  =viridis(44),
                pt.size = 0,raster = FALSE) + NoLegend()
  (p1|p2)/p3
  output.file <- paste0(outdir, "/nFeatureRNAPlot_",spe,"_")
  wggplot((p1|p2)/p3, output.file , height = 10 ,width = 10 )
  # Density
  p1<-plot_density( spe_subsetOBJ, features = "RiboActivity1",size = 0.3) 
  p2<-plot_density( spe_subsetOBJ, features = "SRscore",size = 0.3) 
  p3<-plot_density( spe_subsetOBJ, features = "nCount_RNA",size = 0.3) 
  p4<-plot_density( spe_subsetOBJ, features = "nFeature_RNA",size = 0.3) 
  p<- (p1+p2) / (p3+p4)
  outfiles <- paste0( outdir ,"UMAPDensity_Plot_",spe)
  wggplot( p ,outfiles,height =10,width =10 )

}

output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds")
saveRDS(fitting_result , output.file ,compress = FALSE)

#combinedOBJ
output.file <- paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds")
saveRDS(combinedOBJ , output.file)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```


## pando prediction 

```{r}
#########################################################
# Function
#########################################################


# 疎行列 counts から「各ピークで >0 のセル数」を高速に計算
# counts: dgCMatrix (features x cells)
open_cell_counts <- function(counts) {
  if (!inherits(counts, "dgCMatrix")) counts <- as(counts, "dgCMatrix")
  # 0/1化して rowSums（@x を直接いじるのでコピーしてから）
  bin <- counts
  bin@x <- rep.int(1, length(bin@x))
  Matrix::rowSums(bin)
}

# RNA counts と cell名から、human/marmoset の発現率をベクトル化で計算
calc_exprate <- function(rna_counts, human_pattern = "Human") {
  # rna_counts: genes x cells (dgCMatrix 推奨)
  if (!inherits(rna_counts, "dgCMatrix")) rna_counts <- as(rna_counts, "dgCMatrix")
  cell_is_human <- grepl(human_pattern, colnames(rna_counts), fixed = TRUE)
  nh <- sum(cell_is_human)
  nm <- sum(!cell_is_human)

  # >0 判定の疎行列を0/1化して rowSums
  bin <- rna_counts
  bin@x <- rep.int(1, length(bin@x))

  human_open <- Matrix::rowSums(bin[, cell_is_human, drop = FALSE])
  marm_open  <- Matrix::rowSums(bin[, !cell_is_human, drop = FALSE])

  data.frame(
    human = human_open / nh,
    marmoset = marm_open / nm,
    row.names = rownames(rna_counts)
  )
}

# species 1つ分の Pando GRN を実行
run_pando_for_species <- function(
  spe,
  atac_obj,
  selectedGene,
  motifs,
  motif2tf,
  genomeName,
  outdir,
  ncores = 8,
  distance_thresh = 10000,
  open_rate_thresh = 0.01,
  peak_to_gene_method = "GREAT",
  p_thresh = 0.1,
  nvar_thresh = 2,
  min_genes_per_module = 3,
  rsq_thresh = 0.05
) {
  message("---- Running Pando for: ", spe, " ----")

  DefaultAssay(atac_obj) <- "ATAC"

  annotations <- Annotation(atac_obj[["ATAC"]])
  peak_region <- rownames(atac_obj[["ATAC"]])

  transcript_annotation <- annotations[mcols(annotations)$type == "transcript", ]
  gr_resized <- resize_by_strand_with_region_string(transcript_annotation,up = 0 ,down = 0)

  closest_genes <- ClosestFeature(
    atac_obj,
    regions = peak_region,
    annotation = gr_resized
  )

  counts <- atac_obj@assays$ATAC$counts
  open_cell <- open_cell_counts(counts)
  total_cell <- ncol(atac_obj)

  filtered_peak <- closest_genes %>%
    mutate(
      open_cell = open_cell[query_region],
      open_rate = open_cell / total_cell
    ) %>%
    filter(distance < distance_thresh, open_rate > open_rate_thresh) %>%
    pull(query_region) %>%
    unique()

  muo_data <- atac_obj
  muo_data <- initiate_grn(
    muo_data,
    rna_assay  = "RNA",
    peak_assay = "ATAC",
    regions    = StringToGRanges(filtered_peak)
  )

  muo_data <- find_motifs(
    muo_data,
    pfm       = motifs,
    motif_tfs = motif2tf,
    genome    = genomeName
  )

  # 並列は外で registerDoParallel しておけばOKだが、
  # ここでも ncores に合わせたい場合は上書きできる
  registerDoParallel(ncores)

  muo_data <- infer_grn(
    muo_data,
    peak_to_gene_method = peak_to_gene_method,
    genes = selectedGene,
    parallel = TRUE
  )

  muo_data <- find_modules(
    muo_data,
    p_thresh = p_thresh,
    nvar_thresh = nvar_thresh,
    min_genes_per_module = min_genes_per_module,
    rsq_thresh = rsq_thresh
  )

  modules <- NetworkModules(muo_data)

  # 出力
  coef_tfts <- coef(muo_data)
  write.table(
    coef_tfts,
    file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_modelcoef.txt", spe)),
    quote = FALSE, sep = "\t",
    row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA
  )
  write.table(
    modules@meta,
    file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_module.txt", spe)),
    quote = FALSE, sep = "\t",
    row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA
  )

  # QC plot
  p1 <- plot_gof(muo_data, point_size = 3)
  wggplot(p1, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_qc_%s_", spe)), height = 10, width = 10)

  p2 <- plot_module_metrics(muo_data)
  wggplot(p2, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_qc2_%s_", spe)), height = 3, width = 10)

  muo_data <- get_network_graph(muo_data)
  p3 <- plot_network_graph(muo_data)
  wggplot(p3, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_network_%s_", spe)), height = 15, width = 15)

  saveRDS(filtered_peak, file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_filtered_peak.rds", spe)))
  saveRDS(muo_data,     file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_seuratLINKED_afPando.rds", spe)))

  invisible(list(muo_data = muo_data, filtered_peak = filtered_peak, modules = modules))
}

#########################################################
# Main
#########################################################

# Load fitting result
fitting_result <- readRDS(paste0(param$outdir_list$Pseudotime,
                                 "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))

# outdir
param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir, "/Pando/")
outdir <- make_outdir(param$outdir)

# Load combined obj once
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir, "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds"))

# selectedGene（高速化版）
rna_counts <- GetAssayData(combinedOBJ, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
expRate_df <- calc_exprate(rna_counts, human_pattern = "Human")
selectedGene <- expRate_df %>%
  filter(human >= 0.1 | marmoset >= 0.1) %>%
  rownames()

# motifs
data("motifs")
data("motif2tf")

# 安全に書き出し
capture.output(motifs@listData, file = file.path(outdir, "motif_inf.txt"))
write.table(motif2tf,
            file = file.path(outdir, "motif2tf.txt"),
            quote = FALSE, sep = "\t",
            row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

# 先に並列設定（必要なら species ごとに上書き）
registerDoParallel(12)

#########################################################
# Run: marmoset / human
#########################################################

# marmoset
res_marmoset <- run_pando_for_species(
  spe = "marmoset",
  atac_obj = fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$atac_obj,
  selectedGene = selectedGene,
  motifs = motifs,
  motif2tf = motif2tf,
  genomeName = "BSgenome.Cjacchus.UCSC.calJac4",
  outdir = outdir,
  ncores = 12
)

# human
res_human <- run_pando_for_species(
  spe = "human",
  atac_obj = fitting_result[["human"]]$atac_obj,
  selectedGene = selectedGene,
  motifs = motifs,
  motif2tf = motif2tf,
  genomeName = "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38",
  outdir = outdir,
  ncores = 12
)

stopImplicitCluster()
# cleanup（必要なら）
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("param", "fitting_result", "res_marmoset", "res_human")))
gc()

```

## pando plotting
```{r}

#suppressPackageStartupMessages({
#  library(Seurat)
#  library(dplyr)
#  library(Matrix)
#  library(tibble)
#  library(chromVAR)
#  library(SummarizedExperiment)
#  library(motifmatchr)
#  library(viridisLite)
#  library(igraph)
#})

#########################################################
# Params / Load
#########################################################

total_day <- param$Info$Prediction$total_day + 1
bin_day   <- param$Info$Prediction$bin

fitting_result <- readRDS(paste0(param$outdir_list$Pseudotime,
                                 "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir, "/Pando/")
outdir <- make_outdir(param$outdir)

# Load combined obj once（重複削除）
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir, "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds"))
common_gene <- rownames(combinedOBJ)

#########################################################
# selectedGene（apply→疎行列ベクトル化）
#########################################################

rna_counts <- GetAssayData(combinedOBJ, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
expRate_df <- calc_exprate(rna_counts, human_pattern = "Human")

selectedGene <- expRate_df %>%
  filter(human >= 0.1 | marmoset >= 0.1) %>%
  rownames()

gc()

#########################################################
# Prep Data: binaverage_score（speciesで共通化）
#########################################################

prep_binaverage_score_one <- function(spe, fitting_result, use_scaled_rna = FALSE,
                                      n_rna_bins = 45) {
  spe_atacOBJ   <- fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_obj
  # timeBin_data <- fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data  # ここでは未使用なら読みっぱなし回避
  # spe_subsetOBJ<- fitting_result[[spe]]$seuratobj       # 同上

  # bin / clusterラベル
  spe_atacOBJ$bin <- spe_atacOBJ$time.idx
  spe_atacOBJ$bin_Cluster <- spe_atacOBJ$CellType
  spe_atacOBJ$bin_Cluster[!is.na(spe_atacOBJ$bin)] <- as.character(spe_atacOBJ$bin[!is.na(spe_atacOBJ$bin)])

  # --- ATAC average (layer="data") ---
  DefaultAssay(spe_atacOBJ) <- "ATAC"
  sc.mat.atac.ave <- AverageExpression(
    spe_atacOBJ, assays = "ATAC",
    group.by = "bin_Cluster", layer = "data"
  )$ATAC
  colnames(sc.mat.atac.ave) <- gsub("^g", "", colnames(sc.mat.atac.ave))

  # --- RNA average ---
  DefaultAssay(spe_atacOBJ) <- "RNA"

  if (use_scaled_rna) {
    feats <- rownames(spe_atacOBJ)
    spe_atacOBJ <- ScaleData(spe_atacOBJ, features = feats, verbose = FALSE)

    sc.mat.rna.ave <- AverageExpression(
      spe_atacOBJ, assays = "RNA",
      group.by = "bin_Cluster", layer = "scale.data"
    )$RNA
  } else {
    sc.mat.rna.ave <- AverageExpression(
      spe_atacOBJ, assays = "RNA",
      group.by = "bin_Cluster", layer = "data"
    )$RNA
  }

  colnames(sc.mat.rna.ave) <- gsub("^g", "", colnames(sc.mat.rna.ave))

  list(
    atac = sc.mat.atac.ave,
    rna  = sc.mat.rna.ave,
    nearGene = fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_closet_gene
  )
}

binaverage_score <- setNames(
  lapply(c("human", "marmoset"), prep_binaverage_score_one,
         fitting_result = fitting_result,
         use_scaled_rna = FALSE,   # ←Z-score平均が必要ならTRUEへ
         n_rna_bins = 44),
  c("human", "marmoset")
)

#########################################################
# Cluster average (combined)
#########################################################

ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression(
  combinedOBJ,
  group.by = c("species", "seurat_clusters"),
  assays = "RNA",
  layer = "data"
)$RNA %>% as.data.frame()

#########################################################
# Load motif data (once)
#########################################################
data("motifs")
data("motif2tf")

genomeName <- list(
  marmoset = "BSgenome.Cjacchus.UCSC.calJac4",
  human    = "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38"
)

#########################################################
# chromVAR + module postprocessing（speciesで共通化）
#########################################################

# TF_binrank：applyをやめて max.col で高速化
make_TF_binrank <- function(rna_ave_mat, tf_list, colnames_list = NULL ) {
  if( is.null(colnames_list)){
    print(" colnames_list nullです" )
    return(NULL)
  }
  if( ! all(colnames_list %in% colnames(rna_ave_mat)  ) ){
    erro_col <- colnames_list[! colnames_list %in% colnames(rna_ave_mat)  ]
    print(" colnames_list が matに含まれていないカラムを持っています。" )
    print(erro_col  )
    return(NULL)
    
  }
  mat <- as.matrix(rna_ave_mat[, colnames_list, drop = FALSE])
  idx <- max.col(mat, ties.method = "first")
  bin_category <- colnames(mat)[idx]

  out <- data.frame(
    Gene = rownames(mat),
    bin_category = bin_category,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  out$bin <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(out$bin_category))
  rownames(out) <- out$Gene
  return(out)
  # TFだけに絞るならここで
  #out[out$Gene %in% tf_list, , drop = FALSE]
}

run_chromvar_and_export <- function(muo_data, filtered_peak, motifs, motif2tf,
                                   genome_pkg, outdir, spe) {
  # grn regions と raw peak の対応表（grn_range バグ修正）
  gr <- muo_data@grn@regions@ranges
  grn_region <- paste0(as.character(seqnames(gr)), ":", start(gr), "-", end(gr))

  pando_region2Peak <- data.frame(
    grn_data = grn_region,
    raw = rownames(muo_data@data)[muo_data@grn@regions@peaks],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # filtered_peak を Pando内のrawピークに合わせて絞る
  keep <- unique(pando_region2Peak$raw)
  filtered_peak <- filtered_peak[filtered_peak %in% keep]

  DefaultAssay(muo_data@data) <- "ATAC"
  atac_counts <- GetAssayData(muo_data@data, assay = "ATAC", layer = "counts")[filtered_peak, , drop = FALSE]

  rowRanges <- StringToGRanges(filtered_peak)
  chromvarobj <- SummarizedExperiment(
    assays = list(counts = atac_counts),
    rowRanges = rowRanges,
    colData = muo_data@data@meta.data
  )

  chromvarobj <- addGCBias(chromvarobj, genome = genome_pkg)
  motif_ix <- matchMotifs(motifs, chromvarobj, genome = genome_pkg)

  chromvarobj_dev <- computeDeviations(object = chromvarobj, annotations = motif_ix)

  dev_mat <- deviations(chromvarobj_dev)
  dev_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(dev_mat)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("motif") %>%
    left_join(motif2tf %>% select(motif, tf), by = "motif") %>%
    relocate(motif, tf)

  write.table(
    dev_df,
    file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("deviations_matrix_%s_pando_motif.txt", spe)),
    quote = FALSE, sep = "\t",
    row.names = FALSE, col.names = TRUE
  )

  saveRDS(motif_ix, file.path(outdir, sprintf("MotifPeak_match_%s.rds", spe)))

  invisible(list(filtered_peak = filtered_peak, motif_ix = motif_ix, dev_df = dev_df))
}

postprocess_one_species <- function(spe, outdir, motifs, motif2tf, genomeName,
                                    binaverage_score, common_gene, ClusterAverageEXP,chromvar=F) {

  muo_data <- readRDS(file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_seuratLINKED_afPando.rds", spe)))
  modules <- NetworkModules(muo_data)

  TF_list <- unique(motif2tf$tf)
  TF_list <- intersect(common_gene, TF_list)

  # TF bin rank（高速）
  colnames_list =c(0:43,"Differentiation") %>% as.character()
  TF_binrank <- make_TF_binrank(binaverage_score[[spe]]$rna, TF_list, colnames_list = colnames_list )

  # coef + fit 結合（順序の明示）
  coed_model_tfts <- muo_data@grn@networks$glm_network@coefs %>%
    left_join(muo_data@grn@networks$glm_network@fit, by = "target")

  module_data <- modules@meta %>%
    left_join(TF_binrank, by = c("tf" = "Gene")) %>%
    left_join(
      binaverage_score[[spe]]$rna %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene"),
      by = c("tf" = "gene")
    )

  # ---- outputs ----
  write.table(module_data,
              file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_module_with_Exp.txt", spe)),
              quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

  write.table(coed_model_tfts,
              file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_modelcoef.txt", spe)),
              quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

  write.table(modules@meta,
              file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_module.txt", spe)),
              quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

  # QC plot（ファイル名整理）
  p <- plot_gof(muo_data, point_size = 3)
  wggplot(p, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_qc_%s_", spe)), height = 10, width = 10)

  p <- plot_module_metrics(muo_data)
  wggplot(p, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_qc2_%s_", spe)), height = 3, width = 10)

  # UMAP graph plot
  muo_data <- get_network_graph(muo_data, graph_name = "umap_graph")
  umap_graph <- NetworkGraph(muo_data, graph = "umap_graph")

  plot_gene <- TF_binrank[intersect(V(umap_graph)$name, TF_binrank$Gene), , drop = FALSE]
  node_cat <- setNames(plot_gene$bin_category, plot_gene$Gene)

  pal <- viridisLite::viridis(44)
  pal <- c(pal, "red", "gray")
  names(pal) <- c(0:43, "Differentiation", "Other")

  p1 <- plot_grn_custom(
    muo_data,
    node_color  = node_cat,
    palette     = pal,
    color_label = "bin category",
    title       = paste0("GRN UMAP | bin (", spe, ")"),
    size_range  = c(1, 8),
    show_labels = TF_list
  )
  wggplot(p1, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_GRN_Umap_%s_", spe)), height = 10, width = 15)

  # Full graph
  muo_data <- get_network_graph(muo_data)
  p <- plot_network_graph(muo_data)
  wggplot(p, file.path(outdir, sprintf("pando_network_%s_", spe)), height = 15, width = 15)

  # ranking
  tf_rank <- modules@meta %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    group_by(tf) %>%
    summarise(num_of_target = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(num_of_target)) %>%
    left_join(ClusterAverageEXP %>% rownames_to_column("Gene"),
              by = c("tf" = "Gene"))

  write.table(tf_rank,
              file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_TF_ranking.txt", spe)),
              quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

  gene_rank <- coed_model_tfts %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    group_by(target) %>%
    summarise(num_of_target = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(num_of_target))

  write.table(gene_rank,
              file = file.path(outdir, sprintf("%s_pando_Gene_ranking.txt", spe)),
              quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = TRUE, col.names = NA)

  # 保存（ファイル名のドット修正）
  muo_data <- get_network_graph(muo_data, graph_name = "full_graph", umap_method = "none")
  saveRDS(muo_data, file.path(outdir, sprintf("plottedPandoOBJ_%s.rds", spe)))

  invisible(list(muo_data = muo_data, modules = modules, TF_binrank = TF_binrank))
}

# speciesをまとめて実行
res_list <- setNames(
  lapply(c("human", "marmoset"), postprocess_one_species,
         outdir = outdir,
         motifs = motifs,
         motif2tf = motif2tf,
         genomeName = genomeName,
         binaverage_score = binaverage_score,
         common_gene = common_gene,
         ClusterAverageEXP = ClusterAverageEXP),
  c("human", "marmoset")
)

# cleanup（必要なら）
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("param", "fitting_result", "res_marmoset", "res_human")))
gc()
```

## Bin Correlation

```{r  }


### MakeCorrelationPlot
###
### @input :     Compare_obj_list ,outdir ,common_gene , category 
### @return : None

MakeCorrelationPlot <- function( Compare_obj_list ,outdir ,common_gene , category = "bin" ,assayD="RNA", ht_title=""){
  if (  !category %in% colnames(Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data) ) {
    print( paste0( "category: ", category , " not inmetadate. plese retry..") )
    return(0)
  }
  ## main comapre 2 species
  # resset assay
  Compare_obj_list <- lapply(Compare_obj_list , function(x){ resetAssayt(x, assayD ,common_gene) } )
  spe_name = names(Compare_obj_list)
  
  ## 平均発現量での相関を評価
  mean_bin_exp_spe1 = AverageExpression( Compare_obj_list[[1]] , assays = assayD ,group.by =  category )[[assayD]]
  mean_bin_exp_spe2 = AverageExpression( Compare_obj_list[[2]] , assays = assayD ,group.by =  category )[[assayD]]
  
  colnames(mean_bin_exp_spe1) <- paste0( gsub("[0-9]$","",spe_name[1]) , "_" , gsub("^g","",colnames(mean_bin_exp_spe1)) )
  colnames(mean_bin_exp_spe2) <- paste0( gsub("[0-9]$","",spe_name[2])  , "_" , gsub("^g","",colnames(mean_bin_exp_spe2)) )
  bin_cor_matrix <- cor(mean_bin_exp_spe2[common_gene,] %>% as.matrix() , mean_bin_exp_spe1[common_gene,] %>% as.matrix() )
  
  # barplot of bin count 
  if ( category == "bin" | category == "mod_bin") {
    
    if (category == "bin" ){
      bin_count_spe1 <-table(Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data$RNA_cluster, 
                             Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data$bin) %>% as.matrix() %>% t
      
      bin_count_spe2 <-table(Compare_obj_list[[2]]@meta.data$RNA_cluster, 
                             Compare_obj_list[[2]]@meta.data$bin) %>% as.matrix() %>% t
      rownames(bin_count_spe1) <- 0:43    
      rownames(bin_count_spe2) <- 0:43
    } else{
      
      bin_count_spe1 <-table(Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data$RNA_cluster, 
                             Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data$mod_bin) %>% as.matrix() %>% t
      
      bin_count_spe2 <-table(Compare_obj_list[[2]]@meta.data$RNA_cluster, 
                             Compare_obj_list[[2]]@meta.data$mod_bin) %>% as.matrix() %>% t
      print( bin_count_spe1)
      rownames(bin_count_spe1)[1:44] <- 0:43
      rownames(bin_count_spe2)[1:44]<- 0:43
    }
    #+++ Heatamap ++++++
    ## col annotaion = x軸 spe2
    #HeatmapAnnotaion 
    annotation_spe1 <-  setNames( 
      list( anno_barplot(bin_count_spe1,bar_width = 1,
                         gp = gpar(fill = cluster_pallete[colnames(bin_count_spe1)] ),
                         border = TRUE,axis = TRUE,
                         height = unit(4, "cm"))  ) 
      , spe_name[1] )  
    annotation_spe2 <- setNames( 
      list( anno_barplot(bin_count_spe2,bar_width = 1,
                         gp = gpar(fill = cluster_pallete[colnames(bin_count_spe2)] ),
                         border = TRUE,axis = TRUE,which = "row",
                         width = unit(4, "cm"))  ) 
      , spe_name[2] )  
  } else {
    bin_count_spe1 <- table(Compare_obj_list[[1]]@meta.data[, category])  %>% as.matrix
    #rownames(bin_count_spe1) <- 0:43
    bin_count_spe2 <-table(Compare_obj_list[[2]]@meta.data[, category])  %>% as.matrix
    #rownames(bin_count_spe2) <- 0:43
    
    annotation_spe1 <-  setNames( 
      list( anno_barplot(bin_count_spe1,bar_width = 1,
                         gp = gpar(fill = cluster_pallete[rownames(bin_count_spe1)] ),
                         border = TRUE,axis = TRUE,
                         height = unit(4, "cm"))  ) 
      , spe_name[1] )  
    annotation_spe2 <- setNames( 
      list( anno_barplot(bin_count_spe2,bar_width = 1,
                         gp = gpar(fill = cluster_pallete[rownames(bin_count_spe2)] ),
                         border = TRUE,axis = TRUE,which = "row",
                         width = unit(4, "cm"))  ) 
      , spe_name[2] )  
  }
  
  ha <- do.call(HeatmapAnnotation, annotation_spe1)
  row_ha <- do.call(rowAnnotation ,annotation_spe2 )
  
  col_viridis = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") 
  
  #print(bin_cor_matrix )
  ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix,
             name = "Correlation", 
             #col = col_viridis ,
             column_title = ht_title,
             top_annotation = ha, 
             left_annotation = row_ha,
             show_column_names = T,
             show_row_names =  T,
             cluster_columns = FALSE,
             cluster_rows = FALSE , width = unit(18, "cm"),height = unit(18, "cm"))
  #+++ Heatamap ++++++
  
  output.file = paste0( outdir,"bincorrelationHeatmap.pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 14 ,width = 14)
  
  draw(ht)
  dev.off()
  
  output.file = paste0( outdir,"bincorrelationHeatmap.png" )
  png( file = output.file , height = 1000 ,width = 1000)
  draw(ht)
  dev.off()
  return( list( cormat = bin_cor_matrix , mean1 = mean_bin_exp_spe1 , mean2 = mean_bin_exp_spe2  ) )
}



#########################################################
# LOAD_DATA
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
bin_range = 0:(total_day+1)

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Cor/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}


fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
spe_subsetOBJ_m <- fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$seuratobj
spe_subsetOBJ_h <- fitting_result[["human"]]$seuratobj
spe_subsetOBJ_m$RNA_cluster<- factor( spe_subsetOBJ_m$seurat_clusters,levels = c(8,1,5,3,6,7))
spe_subsetOBJ_h$RNA_cluster<- factor( spe_subsetOBJ_h$seurat_clusters,levels = c(8,1,5,3,6,7))

#common_gene_ptime <- intersect( V(networklist_set[[1]]$graph)$name , V(networklist_set[[2]]$graph)$name )

marmoset_ptime_gene <- lapply( fitting_result$marmoset$fitting,function(x){ return(x[1,1]) } ) %>% unlist
human_ptime_gene    <- lapply( fitting_result$human$fitting,function(x){ return(x[1,1]) } ) %>% unlist
common_gene_ptime <- intersect( marmoset_ptime_gene , human_ptime_gene )


#########################################################
# Compare Expression each bin
#########################################################

## Compare 
# input
Compare_obj_list <- list( "Marmoset" = spe_subsetOBJ_m ,"Human" = spe_subsetOBJ_h  )
outdir <- param$outdir 
cor_res_list <- list()

Compare_obj_list <- lapply(Compare_obj_list ,function(x){ DefaultAssay(x) <-"RNA"; return(x)} )
common_gene <- intersect( rownames(Compare_obj_list[[1]]) , rownames(Compare_obj_list[[2]]) )

## CompareMarmoset_all_gene Bin
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Bin_cor_commonGene_marmoset_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset1" = spe_subsetOBJ_m ,"Marmoset2" = spe_subsetOBJ_m  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "bin", ht_title="Marmosets"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_marmoset.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

## CompareHuman_all_gene Bin
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Bin_cor_commonGene_human_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Human1" = spe_subsetOBJ_h ,"Human2" = spe_subsetOBJ_h  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "bin" , ht_title="Humans"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_human.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

## CompareMarmoset_all_gene Bin
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_marmoset_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset1" = spe_subsetOBJ_m ,"Marmoset2" = spe_subsetOBJ_m  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Cluster_cor_commonGene_marmoset.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

## CompareHuman_all_gene Bin
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_human_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Human1" = spe_subsetOBJ_h ,"Human2" = spe_subsetOBJ_h  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Cluster_cor_commonGene_human.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

#########################################################
# Compare Expression speceis
#########################################################

## CompareMarmoset_all_gene bin
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Bin_cor_commonGene_Species_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset" = spe_subsetOBJ_m ,"Human" = spe_subsetOBJ_h  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "bin"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_Species_.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

## CompareMarmoset_all_gene Cluster
outdir1 <- paste0(param$outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_Species_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset" = spe_subsetOBJ_m ,"Human" = spe_subsetOBJ_h  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Cluster_cor_commonGene_Species.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )


rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```

## Gene Clustering by Tsfeature

```{r Glasso, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# python setting
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
use_python(param$condapath, required = TRUE)
# Pythonのfastdtwとscipyをインポート
fastdtw <- import("fastdtw")
scipy <- import("scipy.spatial.distance")

#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# read data
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
bin_range = 0:(total_day+1)

fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))

#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# Analysis
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++


ClusterResult = list( human= NULL , marmoset =NULL )
sil_widths_Result = list( human= NULL , marmoset =NULL )
plan(multisession, workers = 15)  # コア数を制限

registerDoFuture()
for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){
  timeBin_data <-fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  sc.spline.fits <- fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam 
  sc.tc.data<-  converSplineToMat(spline.fits = sc.spline.fits ,
                              bin_range= bin_range ,
                              gene_col = "GeneID")
  
  ts_list <- apply(sc.tc.data$mat, 1, function(x) ts(x))
  # 特徴量を抽出（デフォルトで複数の統計量を計算）
  features <- tsfeatures(ts_list)
  rownames(features) <- colnames(ts_list)
  # k-medoidsクラスタリング特徴量ベース）
  # クラスタ数の範囲
  k_range <- 2:15
  # 並列ループ
  results <- foreach(k = k_range, .packages = c("cluster")) %dopar% {
    pam_fit <- pam(features, k)
    sil <- silhouette(pam_fit)
    sil_width <- mean(sil[, 3])
    list(k = k, sil_width = sil_width, pam_fit = pam_fit)
  }
  
  # 結果の整理
  sil_widths <- numeric(length(k_range))
  clust_result_list <- vector("list", length(k_range))
  
  for (i in seq_along(results)) {
    sil_widths[i] <- results[[i]]$sil_width
    clust_result_list[[i]] <- results[[i]]$pam_fit
  }
  names(sil_widths) <- k_range
  sil_widths_Result[[spe]] = sil_widths
  ClusterResult[[spe]] =  clust_result_list
}
plan(sequential)


output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,"/Tsfeature_human_silhouetteplot.pdf")
pdf( file = output.file , height = 5 ,width = 7)
plot(sil_widths_Result[["human"]])
dev.off()

output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,"/Tsfeature_marmoset_silhouetteplot.pdf")
pdf( file = output.file , height = 5 ,width = 7)
plot(sil_widths_Result[["marmoset"]])
dev.off()

k_selectionlist<-list( 
  P1 = list("human" =  10, "marmoset" = 6),
  P2 = list("human" =  10, "marmoset" = 6), ##
  P3 = list("human" =  8, "marmoset" = 6),
  P4 = list("human" =  10, "marmoset" = 6), ##
  P5 = list("human" =  8, "marmoset" = 7)  ##
  )


#p3
best_k_list = k_selectionlist[[param$PATTERN]]




for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){
  # 2回目に高いシルエット幅のKを選ぶ
  sil_widths =  sil_widths_Result[[spe]]
  #plot(sil_widths)
  best_k <-best_k_list[[spe]]
  print(paste0("Spceies...", spe , "\n Choose best K = "))
  print(best_k)
  clust_result <- ClusterResult[[spe]][[best_k]]
  # クラスタ割り当ての表示
  print(table(clust_result$clustering))
  
  #シルエット幅の再計算
  sil_widths <- numeric(length(k_range))
  for (i in k_range) {
    sil_widths[i] <- mean(silhouette(ClusterResult[[spe]][[i-1]])[,3])
  }
  
  sil_widths[1] <-NA
  output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,"/Tsfeature_", spe,"_silhouetteplot.pdf")
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 5 ,width = 7)
  plot(sil_widths)
  dev.off()
}

Clusterrng_all_result <- list(
  best_k_list = best_k_list,
  sil_widths_Result = sil_widths_Result,
  ClusterResult = ClusterResult
)


output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "/resultTSfeature_SelectedK_res.rds")
saveRDS(Clusterrng_all_result , output.file)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```


## TF / ATAC Fitting

```{r fitting TF /ATAC, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
get_peaks_per_gene <- function(gr_resized, peak_rownames) {
  # peak rownames → GRanges (例: "chr1-10000-11000" 形式)
  peak_gr <- StringToGRanges(peak_rownames)  # Signac関数
  gr_string <- GRangesToString(gr_resized)
  # overlap: gr_resized(gene単位) × peaks
  hits <- findOverlaps(gr_resized, peak_gr)
  # gene_id → peaks list
  gene_ids <- gr_resized$gene_id[queryHits(hits)]
  peaks_hit <- peak_rownames[subjectHits(hits)]
  #result <- split(peaks_hit, gene_ids)
  hits %>% 
    as.data.frame()%>% 
    mutate( query_region = peak_rownames[subjectHits] ,
            gene_name = gr_resized$gene_name[queryHits] ,
            closest_region = gr_string[queryHits] ,
            gene_id = gr_resized$gene_id[queryHits],
            transcript_id =gr_resized$transcript_id[queryHits] ) %>%
    select(-queryHits , -subjectHits) %>% 
    distinct() %>%
  return()  # named list: gene_id → character vector of peak names
}

#########################################################
# LOAD_DATA
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
# GGM_nodeData_list <- readRDS(  paste0( param$outdir_list$GGM , "/Nerwork_NodeData.rds") )

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/ATAC_TF/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

#########################################################
# ATAC data
#########################################################
# ATAC_fitting = list(  human = NULL , marmoset = NULL )

for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){

  timeBin_data <-fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  sc.spline.fits <- fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam
  var.genes.sig <-  sapply(sc.spline.fits , function(x){x$GeneID[1] } )
  ssc_cells <- timeBin_data$sds.data$Cell 
  spe_atac_subsetOBJ <- fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_obj
  
  ######################
  # ClosestFeature of Peak 
  ######################
  DefaultAssay(spe_atac_subsetOBJ) <-"ATAC"
  annotations <- Annotation( spe_atac_subsetOBJ[["ATAC"]] )
  transcript_annotationdt <- annotations[mcols(annotations)$type == "transcript",]
  peak_region <- rownames(spe_atac_subsetOBJ)
  gr_resized <- resize_by_strand_with_region_string(transcript_annotationdt ,up=1000 ,down = 500)
  closest_genes <- ClosestFeature(spe_atac_subsetOBJ, 
                                  regions = peak_region,
                                  annotation = gr_resized )
  if( !"transcript_id" %in% colnames( closest_genes) ){ 
    colnames( closest_genes)[ colnames( closest_genes) == "tx_id" ] = "transcript_id"
  }
  
  feature_closest_genes <-closest_genes[closest_genes$distance <= 500 ,
                                        c("query_region" , "gene_name","distance" ,
                                          "closest_region","gene_id", "transcript_id" ) ]
  var.genes_closest_feature <- feature_closest_genes %>% filter(gene_name %in% var.genes.sig )
    
  #gene_closest_peak <- get_peaks_per_gene(gr_resized ,peak_region  )
  #var.genes_closest_feature <- gene_closest_peak %>% filter(gene_name %in% var.genes.sig )

  ###########################
  ## select variable gene make cycle matrix
  ###########################
  Y <- spe_atac_subsetOBJ@assays$ATAC$data[var.genes_closest_feature$query_region, ssc_cells ] 
  
  vat.genes_check <-apply(Y, 1, function(x){
      return( c( var =var(x) , mean=mean(x), exppct = sum(x>0)/length(x) ) ) }) %>%
      t %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate( region = rownames(.))%>%
    mutate( GeneID = var.genes_closest_feature %>% filter(query_region== region) %>% pull(gene_name) )
  
  vat.genes_check <- vat.genes_check %>% 
    group_by(GeneID) %>% 
    slice_max(order_by = mean, n = 1) %>%
    ungroup()
  summary(vat.genes_check[,] )
  
  cell.ord <- timeBin_data$sds.data$Cell
  pseudotime <- timeBin_data$sds.data %>% pull(time.idx) 
  names(pseudotime) <- timeBin_data$sds.data %>% pull( Cell)
  
  #sc.spline.fits.atac <- fitSmoothSpline(Y , genes = vat.genes_check$region ,total_day = total_day,
  #                                  cell.ord , pseudotime ,num.cores = 20 ,L1=timeBin_data)
  sc.spline.fits.atac <-  fitSmoothGAM(Y ,genes =vat.genes_check$region , 
                                         cell.ord ,
                                         pseudotime , 
                                         total_day = total_day , #外挿分を+1する
                                         num.cores = 4 ,
                                         L1=timeBin_data , k = 7)
  
  sc.spline.fits.atac.mod <- lapply(sc.spline.fits.atac ,function(x,feature_closest_genes ){ 
    region = x$GeneID[1]
    GeneID =feature_closest_genes%>% filter(query_region == region)%>%pull(gene_name)
    x$GeneID <- GeneID
    x$query_region <- region
    return(x)
    } ,feature_closest_genes=feature_closest_genes)
  
  fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_closet_gene.var = var.genes_closest_feature
  fitting_result[[spe]]$atac_closet_gene = feature_closest_genes  
  fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam.atac = sc.spline.fits.atac
  
}

output.file <- paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo_addATAC.rds")
saveRDS(fitting_result , output.file, compress = FALSE)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls(), standardt_obj_list = standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```


 
## Plot Exp Heatmap & subcluster gene

```{r  ExpHeatmap, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
## Input  : param ,subsetOBJ  ,timeBin_data , sc.spline.fits  , node_info
## Output : plot

#########################################################
# LOAD_DATA
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo_addATAC.rds"))
#GGM_nodeData_list <- readRDS(  paste0( param$outdir_list$GGM , "/Nerwork_NodeData.rds") )
GeneCluster_list <- readRDS( paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "/resultTSfeature_SelectedK_res.rds") )


param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Heatmap/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}


pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

pando_predictedTF <- list(human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )

GGM_nodeData_list = list( "human" = NULL , "marmoset" = NULL )

#spe ="human"

for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){

  timeBin_data <-fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  sc.spline.fits <- fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam
  var.genes.sig <-  sapply(sc.spline.fits , function(x){x$GeneID[1] } )
  best_k= GeneCluster_list$best_k_list[[spe]]
  node_info <- GeneCluster_list$ClusterResult[[spe]][[best_k]]
  node_info <- node_info$clustering %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    dplyr::rename( "Cluster"=".") %>%
    mutate(Gene = rownames(.))

  
  #########################################################
  # prep heatmap
  #########################################################
  #rna----------
  sc.mat.rna <- converSplineToMat(spline.fits =sc.spline.fits, 
                                     bin_range= 0:total_day, 
                                     gene_col = "GeneID")
  sc.tc.mus <- sc.mat.rna$mat
  sc.tc.mus.scale <-  sc.mat.rna$scalemat
  maxbin <- sc.mat.rna$maxbin
  names(maxbin) <- rownames(sc.tc.mus)
  
  bin_anno_data <-table(timeBin_data$umap.sds$cluster, timeBin_data$umap.sds$time.idx) %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% t
  rownames(bin_anno_data) <- 0:(total_day)
  
  Cluster_lebels <- as.data.frame(maxbin) %>% 
    rownames_to_column(var="Gene") %>% 
    mutate(Cluster=node_info[Gene,"Cluster"]) %>% 
    group_by(Cluster) %>% 
    summarise(meanbin= mean(maxbin)) %>%
    arrange(meanbin) %>%
    pull(Cluster)
  
  gene_rank <- apply(sc.tc.mus,1,function(x){ which.max(x)}) %>% as.data.frame() 
  colnames(gene_rank) <- "maxpos"
  gene_rank <-  gene_rank %>% 
                arrange(maxpos) %>%
                mutate( GeneID = rownames(.)) %>%
                mutate(GeneCluster = factor(node_info[GeneID,"Cluster"] ,levels = Cluster_lebels))
  
  gene_order_splitCluster <- gene_rank %>%   arrange( GeneCluster ,maxpos )%>%pull(GeneID)
  
  # set cluster color
  num_Genecluster = length(unique(gene_order_splitCluster))
  GeneCluster_col <- palettedt[1:num_Genecluster ]
  names(GeneCluster_col) <- c(0:(num_Genecluster-1) )
  
  #########################################################
  # Average Line Plot
  #########################################################
  pltodata <- sc.tc.mus.scale %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate(Gene =rownames(.)) %>% 
    pivot_longer( -Gene, names_to = "bin",values_to = "EXP" ) %>%
    mutate(Cluster= node_info[Gene,"Cluster"] ) %>% 
    group_by(Cluster ,bin,) %>%
    summarise( AveExp = mean(EXP)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(bin = as.numeric(bin), Cluster = factor(Cluster,levels = Cluster_lebels ))
  
  p<- pltodata%>%
    ggplot(aes(x=bin, y= AveExp , col=Cluster)) + 
    geom_line( )+
    geom_vline(xintercept = 21, linetype = "dotted")+
    scale_color_manual( values = GeneCluster_col) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(vars(Cluster))
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/preCheck_ClusterOrdeer_",spe,"_linePlot.pdf" )
  ggsave( p, file =output.file , height = 7,width = 7 )
  
  
  #########################################################
  # plot heatmap
  #########################################################
  
  ## col annotaion = bin
  ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    stacked_bar = anno_barplot(
      bin_anno_data[1:(total_day+1), ],
      bar_width = 1,
      gp = gpar(fill =cluster_pallete),
      border = TRUE,
      axis = TRUE,
      height = unit(4, "cm")
   )
  )
  # row annotation = Gene
  row_ha = rowAnnotation( GeneCluster = node_info[gene_order_splitCluster,"Cluster"] ,
                          col = list(GeneCluster = GeneCluster_col ) )
  
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/before_subclusterFittedHeatmap_",spe,"_TSfeatureCluster_allGene_merge.pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 12 ,width = 6)
  
  p<-Heatmap(sc.tc.mus.scale[gene_order_splitCluster,] %>% as.matrix() ,
                name = "Fitted Gene Exp", 
                top_annotation = ha, 
                #row_split = row_cluster ,
                left_annotation = row_ha,
                show_column_names = F,
                show_row_names =  F,
                cluster_columns = FALSE,
                cluster_rows = FALSE )
                ##width = unit(10, "cm"))
  print(p)
  dev.off()
  #########################################################
  # SplitCluster
  #########################################################
  
  subCluster_List <- c()
  ## Cluster 1 /5 を分離する
  for (SplitCluster in Cluster_lebels) {
    print( paste0("split Cluseter " , SplitCluster))
    # SplitCluster <- 1
    exstract_undif_CluseterGene <-  node_info %>% 
          filter(Cluster %in% SplitCluster)  %>% 
          pull(Gene)
  　
    subk = 5
    # ユークリッド距離
    dist_matrix <- dist(sc.tc.mus.scale[exstract_undif_CluseterGene,], method = "euclidean")
    hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "complete")
    sub_distclusters <- cutree(hc, k = subk)
    subCluster_List <- c(subCluster_List ,sub_distclusters )
    

  
    # row annotation = Gene
    subCluserOrder <- gene_rank %>% 
      filter( GeneCluster == SplitCluster ) %>%
      mutate( subCluster = sub_distclusters[GeneID])  %>% 
      arrange( subCluster ,maxpos )%>%pull(GeneID)
  
    row_ha = rowAnnotation( GeneCluster = node_info[subCluserOrder,"GeneCluster"] ,
                            SubCluster =  sub_distclusters[subCluserOrder],
                            col = list(GeneCluster = GeneCluster_col , 
                                       SubCluster = GeneCluster_col
                                       ) )
    
    output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/checkFittedHeatmap_",spe,"_SubClusterofC", SplitCluster,"_TSfeature.pdf" )
    pdf( file = output.file , height = 12 ,width = 6)
    p<-Heatmap(sc.tc.mus.scale[subCluserOrder,] ,
                  name = "Fitted Gene Exp", 
                  top_annotation = ha, 
                  #row_split = row_cluster ,
                  left_annotation = row_ha,
                  show_column_names = F,
                  show_row_names =  F,
                  cluster_columns = FALSE,
                  cluster_rows = FALSE )
                  ##width = unit(10, "cm"))
    print(p)
    dev.off()
  }
  
  GGM_nodeData_list[[spe]] <- node_info %>% 
    mutate( SubCluster = subCluster_List[Gene] ) 
}


#########################################################
# manual Sub Cluster 
#########################################################
## P3
P3_manual_cluster <- list(
  human = list(
  "1" = c( "1" = "C1-1", "2" = "C1-1", "3"= "C1-1", "4" = "C1-1", "5" = "C1-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "2" = c( "1" = "C2-1", "2" = "C2-1", "3"= "C2-2", "4" = "C2-2", "5" = "C2-3" ) , # 3 subcluster
  "3" = c( "1" = "C3-1", "2" = "C3-1", "3"= "C3-1", "4" = "C3-1", "5" = "C3-1" ) , # 1 subcluster
  "4" = c( "1" = "C4-1", "2" = "C4-1", "3"= "C4-2", "4" = "C4-2", "5" = "C4-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "5" = c( "1" = "C5-1", "2" = "C5-2", "3"= "C5-3", "4" = "C5-4", "5" = "C5-4" ) , # 4 subcluster NoicyCluster
  "6" = c( "1" = "C6-1", "2" = "C6-1", "3"= "C6-1", "4" = "C6-2", "5" = "C6-2" ) , # 2 subcluster  
  "7" = c( "1" = "C7-1", "2" = "C7-2", "3"= "C7-3", "4" = "C7-3", "5" = "C7-4" ) , # 4 subcluster
  "8" = c( "1" = "C8-1", "2" = "C8-1", "3"= "C8-2", "4" = "C8-2", "5" = "C8-1" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "9" = c( "1" = "C9-1", "2" = "C9-1", "3"= "C9-1", "4" = "C9-2", "5" = "C9-2" )  # 2 subcluster
  ) , 
  marmoset = list(
  "1" = c( "1" = "C1-1", "2" = "C1-1", "3"= "C1-1", "4" = "C1-2", "5" = "C1-1" ) , # 1 subcluster
  "2" = c( "1" = "C2-1", "2" = "C2-1", "3"= "C2-1", "4" = "C2-2", "5" = "C2-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "3" = c( "1" = "C3-1", "2" = "C3-1", "3"= "C3-2", "4" = "C3-2", "5" = "C3-3" ) , # 3 subcluster NoicyCluster
  "4" = c( "1" = "C4-1", "2" = "C4-1", "3"= "C4-2", "4" = "C4-2", "5" = "C4-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "5" = c( "1" = "C5-1", "2" = "C5-2", "3"= "C5-1", "4" = "C5-2", "5" = "C5-1" ) , # 2 subcluster 
  "6" = c( "1" = "C6-1", "2" = "C6-1", "3"= "C6-2", "4" = "C6-1", "5" = "C6-2" ) , # 2 subcluster  
  "7" = c( "1" = "C7-1", "2" = "C7-1", "3"= "C7-2", "4" = "C7-1", "5" = "C7-2" )  # 2 subcluster
  )
)

## P5
P5_manual_cluster <- list(
  human = list(
```
