```{r  ExpHeatmap, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
  "1" = c( "1" = "C1-1", "2" = "C1-2", "3"= "C1-1", "4" = "C1-2", "5" = "C1-1" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "2" = c( "1" = "C2-1", "2" = "C2-2", "3"= "C2-2", "4" = "C2-3", "5" = "C2-2" ) , # 3 subcluster
  "3" = c( "1" = "C3-1", "2" = "C3-1", "3"= "C3-1", "4" = "C3-1", "5" = "C3-1" ) , # 1 subcluster
  "4" = c( "1" = "C4-1", "2" = "C4-1", "3"= "C4-1", "4" = "C4-1", "5" = "C4-1" ) , # 1 subcluster
  "5" = c( "1" = "C5-1", "2" = "C5-1", "3"= "C5-1", "4" = "C5-1", "5" = "C5-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "6" = c( "1" = "C6-1", "2" = "C6-2", "3"= "C6-2", "4" = "C6-2", "5" = "C6-1" ) , # 2 subcluster  
  "7" = c( "1" = "C7-1", "2" = "C7-1", "3"= "C7-1", "4" = "C7-2", "5" = "C7-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "8" = c( "1" = "C8-1", "2" = "C8-2", "3"= "C8-1", "4" = "C8-2", "5" = "C8-3" ) , # 3 subcluster
  "9" = c( "1" = "C9-1", "2" = "C9-1", "3"= "C9-2", "4" = "C9-2", "5" = "C9-1" )  # 2 subcluster
  ) , 
  marmoset = list(
  "1" = c( "1" = "C1-1", "2" = "C1-1", "3"= "C1-1", "4" = "C1-2", "5" = "C1-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "2" = c( "1" = "C2-1", "2" = "C2-2", "3"= "C2-2", "4" = "C2-3", "5" = "C2-3" ) , # 3 subcluster
  "3" = c( "1" = "C3-1", "2" = "C3-2", "3"= "C3-3", "4" = "C3-4", "5" = "C3-3" ) , # 4 subcluster NoicyCluster
  "4" = c( "1" = "C4-1", "2" = "C4-1", "3"= "C4-1", "4" = "C4-2", "5" = "C4-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "5" = c( "1" = "C5-1", "2" = "C5-2", "3"= "C5-3", "4" = "C5-3", "5" = "C5-3" ) , # 3 subcluster 
  "6" = c( "1" = "C6-1", "2" = "C6-1", "3"= "C6-1", "4" = "C6-1", "5" = "C6-1" ) , # 1 subcluster  
  "7" = c( "1" = "C7-1", "2" = "C7-1", "3"= "C7-1", "4" = "C7-2", "5" = "C7-2" ) , # 2 subcluster
  "8" = c( "1" = "C8-1", "2" = "C8-2", "3"= "C8-1", "4" = "C8-2", "5" = "C8-3" )  # 3  subcluster
  )
)

manual_cluster_Pattern <-list( 
  P3 = P3_manual_cluster ,  ##
  P5 = P5_manual_cluster  ##
  )

#########################################################
# Rename Sub Cluster 
#########################################################

manual_cluster_list <- manual_cluster_Pattern[[param$PATTERN]]


for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){
  manual_cluster <-manual_cluster_list[[spe]]
  node_info <- GGM_nodeData_list[[spe]]

  #node_info <-  node_info %>% 
  #  mutate( SubCluster = subCluster_List[Node] ) 
  node_info$ManualCluster <- NA
  for( i in  c(1:nrow(node_info)) ){
    C <- node_info[i , "Cluster"]
    subC <-node_info[i , "SubCluster"]
    node_info[i , "ManualCluster"] <- manual_cluster[[ C ]][ subC ]
    
  }
   GGM_nodeData_list[[spe]] <- node_info
}

output.file <- paste0( param$outdir , "/Network_GGM_NodeDF_subCluster.rds")
saveRDS(GGM_nodeData_list , output.file)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls(), standardt_obj_list = standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```


## Plot:Pseudotime Cluster Heatmap PLot

```{r Heatmap plot, include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}

### Gene Order
###
### @input : param,SeuratOBJ , Category_list
### @return : SeuratOBJ 

# subfunction
# クラスタ内の並び替え
#A. ピーク時点 + ピーク強度での並び替え
order_genes_within_cluster <- function(expr_data) {
  # 各遺伝子のピーク時点
  peak_time <- apply(expr_data, 1, which.max)
  # ピーク時の発現強度
  peak_intensity <- apply(expr_data, 1, max)
  # ピーク時点で1次ソート、強度で2次ソート
  order(peak_time, peak_intensity)
}


# subfunction
#B. ピーク検出
order_genes_smooth <- function(expr_data) {
  peak_time <- apply(expr_data, 1, which.max)
  peak_intensity <- apply(expr_data, 1, max)
  order(peak_time, peak_intensity)
}

# subfunction
#C. 二峰性対応：主要ピークと副次ピークの考慮
order_genes_bimodal <- function(expr_data, threshold = 0.7) {
  peak_info <- t(apply(expr_data, 1, function(x) {
    # 正規化
    x_norm <- (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
    
    # 主ピーク
    primary_peak <- which.max(x_norm)
    primary_height <- max(x_norm)
    
    # 副次ピーク（主ピークの70%以上の高さ）
    x_norm[primary_peak] <- 0
    secondary_peak <- which.max(x_norm)
    secondary_height <- max(x_norm)
    
    if (secondary_height > threshold) {
      # 二峰性：早い方のピークを優先
      effective_peak <- min(primary_peak, secondary_peak)
    } else {
      effective_peak <- primary_peak
    }
    
    c(effective_peak, primary_height)
  }))
  
  order(peak_info[, 1], peak_info[, 2])
}


# Main Function
create_heatmap_order <- function(expression_matrix, gene_clusters, ordered_clusters = NULL) {
  
  if( is.null(ordered_clusters) ){
    # クラスタ順序を決定
    cluster_peak_times <- sapply(unique(gene_clusters), function(cl) {
      cluster_expr <- expression_matrix[gene_clusters == cl, , drop = FALSE]
      weighted.mean(1:ncol(cluster_expr), colMeans(cluster_expr))
    })
    ordered_clusters <- names(sort(cluster_peak_times, decreasing = TRUE))
  }
  # 各クラスタ内で遺伝子を並び替え
  final_order <- c()
  
  for (cl in ordered_clusters ) {
    cluster_genes_idx <- which(gene_clusters == cl)
    cluster_expr <- expression_matrix[cluster_genes_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    #print( length(cluster_genes_idx) )
    # スムージング + 二峰性考慮の並び替え
    within_order <- order_genes_bimodal(cluster_expr)
    final_order <- c(final_order, cluster_genes_idx[within_order])
  }
  return(final_order)
}

#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################

total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo_addATAC.rds"))
GGM_nodeData_list <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Heatmap//Network_GGM_NodeDF_subCluster.rds")) 
#LINGERres_trans_edges_AddGMM

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Heatmap_subClusted_num50/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}


if( file.exists(paste0( param$outdir,"ManualClusterPalette.RDS")) ){
  ManualClusterPalette <-  readRDS(paste0(  param$outdir,"ManualClusterPalette.RDS"))
}else{
  ManualClusterPalette <- createPalette(40,　seedcolors=  c("#010101", "#ff0000"), M = 1000,prefix=NA)
  saveRDS(ManualClusterPalette, paste0( param$outdir,"ManualClusterPalette.RDS"))
}


pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

pando_predictedTF <- list(human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )
TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique

# RealTimedata
brdu_perid = 6.63*7
predicted_realTime <- list( "human" = NULL , "marmoset" = NULL)
for ( spe in c("human", "marmoset" )){
  timebin_data <-  fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  predicted_realTime[[spe]] <- PredTime(timebin_data,brdu_perid  )
}



#########################################################
# RNA_exp
#########################################################

P3_ordered_clusters <- list(
  human = c( "C9-2", "C3-1", "C4-2", "C4-1", "C9-1", "C7-3", "C8-2", "C7-2", "C5-2", "C6-2", 
             "C7-1", "C2-3", "C8-1", "C6-1", "C7-4", "C2-2", "C2-1", "C1-1", "C1-2", "C5-3", 
             "C5-1","C5-4"),
  marmoset = c("C6-1", "C6-2", "C7-1","C4-2", "C3-1", "C4-1", "C5-1", "C5-2", "C2-1","C1-1",
               "C1-2", "C2-2", "C7-2", "C3-2", "C3-3")
)


P5_ordered_clusters  <- list(
  human = c("C5-1", "C6-2","C6-1", "C8-1", "C9-1","C7-1","C2-1", "C1-2","C4-1","C3-1",
            "C1-1","C5-2","C2-3","C8-3","C2-2","C7-2","C9-2","C8-2"),
  marmoset = c("C7-1","C7-2","C4-1","C4-2","C8-2","C8-1","C5-3","C5-2","C2-2","C1-2","C6-1",
               "C2-1",  "C1-1"  ,"C2-3", "C3-1","C3-2", "C5-1", "C3-3" ,"C3-4", "C8-3"
  )
)

ordered_clusters_Pattern <-list( 
  P3 = P3_ordered_clusters ,  ##
  P5 = P5_ordered_clusters  ##
  )

ordered_clusters <- ordered_clusters_Pattern[[param$PATTERN]]

HighlightGene <- NULL #c( "CLOCK", "ARNTL2", "SMAD4", "FOXP1",
                    #"HBP1", "MGA", "TFAP2A", "PPARG", "RUNX1","RUNX2","STAT1","SMAD2")

# spe = "human"
numHighlightlimit = 5
numHighlight = 50

AverageEXP_mat = list(human=NULL,marmoset=NULL)

for( spe in c("human" ,"marmoset")){

  timeBin_data <-fitting_result[[spe]]$time.bin.data
  sc.spline.fits <- fitting_result[[spe]]$fitting.gam
  spe_subsetOBJ <- fitting_result[[spe]]$seuratobj
  var.genes.sig <-  sapply(sc.spline.fits , function(x){x$GeneID[1] } )
  node_info <- GGM_nodeData_list[[spe]]
  
  predicted_realTime_spe <- predicted_realTime[[spe]] %>%
    select(- PredDay) %>%
    rename( "bin" = "time.idx", "PredDay" =  "end" ) %>%
    select( bin,PredDay )
  
  #########################################################
  # prep heatmap
  #########################################################
  #rna----------
  sc.mat.rna <- converSplineToMat(spline.fits =sc.spline.fits, 
                                     bin_range= 0:total_day, 
                                     gene_col = "GeneID")
  sc.tc.mus <- sc.mat.rna$mat
  sc.tc.mus.scale <-  sc.mat.rna$scalemat
  maxbin <- sc.mat.rna$maxbin
  names(maxbin) <- rownames(sc.tc.mus)
  
  spe_subsetOBJ <-ScaleData(spe_subsetOBJ, features = rownames(sc.tc.mus))
  
  #--
  # クラスタごとの発現ピーク時点を計算
  gene_clusters <- node_info[ rownames(sc.tc.mus.scale),"ManualCluster" ]
  
  cluster_order_val <- sapply(unique(gene_clusters), function(cl) {
    cluster_genes <- sc.tc.mus.scale[gene_clusters == cl, ]
    # 各クラスタの平均発現パターン
    avg_pattern <- colMeans(cluster_genes)
    # 重心（weighted mean of timepoints）
    weighted.mean(1:ncol(cluster_genes), avg_pattern)
  })
  
  #cluster_order <- order(cluster_order_val)
  ordered_clusters_spe <- ordered_clusters[[spe]]
  gene_order_splitCluster <- rownames(sc.tc.mus.scale)[create_heatmap_order(sc.tc.mus.scale,
                                                                            gene_clusters,ordered_clusters_spe)]
  # node_info[ gene_order_splitCluster, "ManualCluster" ]
  gene_order = gene_order_splitCluster
  Cluster_lebels <- ordered_clusters_spe
  #--
  
  bin_anno_data <-table(timeBin_data$umap.sds$cluster, timeBin_data$umap.sds$time.idx) %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% t
  rownames(bin_anno_data) <- 0:(total_day)
  
  # set cluster color
  num_Genecluster = length(Cluster_lebels)
  GeneCluster_col <- palettedt[1:num_Genecluster ]
  names(GeneCluster_col) <- c(0:(num_Genecluster-1) )

  #########################################################
  # Average Line Plot
  #########################################################
  
  DefaultAssay(spe_subsetOBJ) <- "RNA"
  AverageEXP_bin <- AverageExpression(spe_subsetOBJ , 
                      group.by = "bin" , assays = "RNA")$RNA[ rownames( sc.tc.mus.scale),] %>%
    as.data.frame %>% t %>% scale()%>%t%>% as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>%
    pivot_longer( -Gene, names_to = "bin",values_to = "EXP" ) %>%
    mutate(bin = gsub("g","",bin) , Cluster= node_info[Gene,"Cluster"] ) %>% 
    group_by(Cluster ,bin,) %>%
    summarise( NonFittedEXP = mean(EXP)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(bin = as.numeric(bin), Cluster = factor(Cluster))
    
  pltodata <- sc.tc.mus.scale %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate(Gene =rownames(.)) %>% 
    pivot_longer( -Gene, names_to = "bin",values_to = "EXP" ) %>%
    mutate(Cluster= node_info[Gene,"Cluster"] ) %>% 
    group_by(Cluster ,bin,) %>%
    summarise( AveExp = mean(EXP)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(bin = as.numeric(bin), Cluster = factor(Cluster ))
  
  p<- left_join(pltodata , AverageEXP_bin, by = c("Cluster" ,"bin") ) %>%ungroup() %>%
    ggplot() + 
    geom_line(aes(x=bin, y= AveExp , col=Cluster) ,size = 1   )+
    geom_vline(xintercept = 21, linetype = "dotted")+
    geom_point( aes( x = bin , y= NonFittedEXP) , size = 0.8) + 
    scale_color_manual( values = GeneCluster_col) +
    theme_classic() +  theme(text=element_text(size=20))+ 
    facet_wrap(vars(Cluster))+
    labs(title = paste0(str_to_title(spe),"s") )+
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
    
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/ClusterOrdeer_linePlot_",spe,"_" )
  wggplot( p, file =output.file , height = 9,width = 12 )
  
  #pltodata$Cluster %>%unique() %>% length()
  MCluster_list = Cluster_lebels # node_info[gene_order_splitCluster,"ManualCluster"] %>%unique()
  names(ManualClusterPalette)[1:length(MCluster_list)] <- MCluster_list
  

  ManualClusterAverageEXP_bin <-AverageExpression(spe_subsetOBJ , 
                      group.by = "bin" , assays = "RNA")$RNA[ rownames( sc.tc.mus.scale),] %>%
    as.data.frame %>% t %>% scale()%>%t%>% as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>%
    pivot_longer( -Gene, names_to = "bin",values_to = "EXP" ) %>%
    mutate(bin = gsub("g","",bin) , ManualCluster= node_info[Gene,"ManualCluster"] ) %>% 
    group_by(ManualCluster ,bin,) %>%
    summarise( NonFittedEXP = mean(EXP)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(bin = as.numeric(bin) )
  
  for( i in node_info$Cluster %>% unique() ){
    
   pltodata <-  sc.tc.mus.scale %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate(Gene =rownames(.)) %>% 
    pivot_longer( -Gene, names_to = "bin",values_to = "EXP" ) %>%
    mutate(Cluster= node_info[Gene,"Cluster"] ,
           SubCluster = node_info[Gene,"SubCluster"],
           ManualCluster = node_info[Gene,"ManualCluster"]
           ) %>% 
    filter( Cluster == i ) %>%
    group_by(ManualCluster ,bin) %>%
    summarise( AveExp = mean(EXP)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(bin = as.numeric(bin), ManualCluster = factor(ManualCluster ) )
   
   numcluster =  pltodata$ManualCluster %>%unique() %>% length()
   
   p<- left_join(pltodata , ManualClusterAverageEXP_bin, by = c("ManualCluster" ,"bin") ) %>%
     ungroup() %>%
    ggplot() + 
    geom_line(aes(x=bin, y= AveExp , col=ManualCluster) ,size = 1   )+
    geom_vline(xintercept = 21, linetype = "dotted")+
    geom_point( aes( x = bin , y= NonFittedEXP) , size = 0.5) + 
    scale_color_manual( values = ManualClusterPalette) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(vars(ManualCluster))
    output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/SubCluster_",spe,"_C",i,"_linePlot_cycleFit" )
  
    if( numcluster ==1){
      h=2
      w=4
    } else if( numcluster ==2){
      h=2
      w=6
    } else if( numcluster ==3){
      h=2
      w=6
    }  else if( numcluster ==4){
      h=4
      w=6
    }  else if( numcluster ==5){
      h=4
      w=6
    }
    wggplot( p, file =output.file , height = h ,width = w) 
  }

  #########################################################
  # Common Heatmap
  #########################################################
  ## col annotaion = bin 一度だけ作る
  # 共通変数まとめる
  heatmapCommon_param  <- list(bin_anno_data = bin_anno_data,
                               cluster_pallete = cluster_pallete,
                               node_info = node_info,
                               GeneCluster_col = GeneCluster_col , 
                               ManualClusterPalette= ManualClusterPalette,
                               HighlightGene = NULL,
                               #LINGERres_trans_edges_AddGMM = LINGERres_trans_edges_AddGMM,
                               pandores = pandores[[spe]],
                               Highlightcoldt = c("red","black")
                               )
  


  #########################################################
  # plot heatmap no fitting data
  #########################################################
  
  # rna no fitting data --------------------
  spe_subsetOBJ <-ScaleData(spe_subsetOBJ, features = rownames(sc.tc.mus))
  spe_subsetOBJ@meta.data[ timeBin_data$umap.sds$Cell,"bin" ] <- timeBin_data$umap.sds[, "time.idx"]
  sc.mat.rna.ave= AverageExpression( spe_subsetOBJ  , assays = "RNA" ,
                                     group.by = "bin",layer = "scale.data" )$RNA[rownames(sc.tc.mus),]
  colnames(sc.mat.rna.ave) <- 0:total_day

  ht_nofit <-Plot_binHeatmap( heatmapCommon_param = heatmapCommon_param,
        gene_order = gene_order_splitCluster,
        binmatrix = sc.mat.rna.ave , 
        numHighlight=numHighlight, 
        numHighlightlimit= numHighlightlimit , 
        mainname = "Gene Exp",
        )
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/NotFittedHeatmap_TSfeatureCluster_allGene_merge_",spe,".pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 14 ,width = 12)
  ht_drawn <-draw(ht_nofit)
    decorate_annotation("  PredictedDay", {
      min_day <- min(predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay)
      max_day <- max(predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay)
      
      x_pos <- unit((predicted_realTime_spe $bin + 0.5) / 44, "npc")
      y_pos <- unit((predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay - min_day) / (max_day - min_day), "npc")
      grid.lines(x = x_pos, y = y_pos,
                 gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 2))
      
      pushViewport(viewport(xscale = c(0,1), 
                            yscale = c(min_day, max_day)))
      tick_at <- pretty(c(min_day, max_day), n = 5)
      tick_at <- tick_at[tick_at >= min_day & tick_at <= max_day]
      grid.yaxis(main = FALSE,
                 at = tick_at,
                 gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
      popViewport()
    })
  dev.off()
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/NotFittedHeatmap_TSfeatureCluster_allGene_merge_",spe,".png" )
  png( file = output.file , height = 1400 ,width = 1200)
  ht_drawn <-draw(ht_nofit)
    decorate_annotation("  PredictedDay", {
      min_day <- min(predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay)
      max_day <- max(predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay)
      
      x_pos <- unit((predicted_realTime_spe $bin + 0.5) / 44, "npc")
      y_pos <- unit((predicted_realTime_spe $PredDay - min_day) / (max_day - min_day), "npc")
      grid.lines(x = x_pos, y = y_pos,
                 gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 2))
      
      pushViewport(viewport(xscale = c(0,1), 
                            yscale = c(min_day, max_day)))
      tick_at <- pretty(c(min_day, max_day), n = 5)
      tick_at <- tick_at[tick_at >= min_day & tick_at <= max_day]
      grid.yaxis(main = FALSE,
                 at = tick_at,
                 gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
      popViewport()
    })
  dev.off()
  
  spe_subsetOBJ <- NormalizeData(spe_subsetOBJ ,assay = "RNA" )
  sc.mat.rna.ave_nolog = AverageExpression( spe_subsetOBJ  , assays = "RNA" ,
                                     group.by = "bin",layer = "data" )$RNA[rownames(sc.tc.mus),]
  colnames(sc.mat.rna.ave_nolog) <- 0:total_day
  AverageEXP_mat[[spe]] <- sc.mat.rna.ave_nolog[gene_order_splitCluster,]
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir,"/NotFittedHeatmap_EXP_mat_",spe,".txt" )
  write.table( sc.mat.rna.ave_nolog[gene_order_splitCluster,]  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  
}



wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: human ---
sheet <- paste0("HumanPseudotimeAverageEXP")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-AverageEXP_mat[["human"]]  %>% as.data.frame()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data ,rowNames = TRUE )
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

# --- シート2: marmoset ---
sheet <-  paste0("MarmosetPseudotimeAverageEXP")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-AverageEXP_mat[["marmoset"]] %>% as.data.frame()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data ,rowNames = TRUE )
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+2),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0(param$outdir , "/Pseudotime_AverageExp_matrix.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)




rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```
